problem.title: LINS on KITTI Raw drive 0061 full sequence (703 frames, residential)
problem.question: How does LINS perform on the KITTI Raw drive 0061 full sequence (703 frames, residential)?

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Coarsen the voxel maps and cap correspondences to favor throughput.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Use finer voxel maps and more correspondences for a denser iterated Kalman update.
